g.text: Flight Queue Emergency Handling - Sequence Diagrams
Safety assertion - emergency cannot be queued
[for each emergency flight in detection order]
All non-emergency flights re-queued after emergencies
Postcondition: All emergencies allocated in order
400 Bad Request - Cannot re-queue emergency flight
Original order preserved for non-emergency flights
Pre1: System has queue of scheduled flights with assigned slots
Post1: Emergency flight handled immediately with next available slot
Post2: All previously queued flights re-queued with adjusted slots
Post3: No non-emergency flight loses original order
Post4: Emergency flight placed at front of queue
